info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"list\":[\"user@example.com\"]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/invite-waitlist", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

count.description: The number of invite codes to generate

times.description: The number of invite codes to use

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"count\":10,\"times\":10}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/waitlist-invite-code", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"email\":\"user@example.com\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/join-waitlist", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/auth/waitlist", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
